boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations release a routine action when the dependency closure must match the requested object, scope, and release condition?

boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: REQ-BAP-001 specifies BAP production scope 001 and RC-BAP-001; DEP-BAP-001 covers BAP readiness scope 001 and RC-BAP-001-S. The dependency closure does not exactly match the request on operating scope and release condition per MATCH-BAP-001.

final_answer: The action must remain escalated. The dependency closure DEP-BAP-001 does not precisely match the release request ACT-DEP-BAP-001 on operating scope and release condition.
